commands.review_summary:
This PR changes shared group-policy resolution so explicit `groupPolicy: "open"` treats `groups` entries as per-group overrides, adds resolver tests, and updates group/security docs plus a changelog entry.

PR surface: Source +6, Tests +59, Docs +2. Total +67 across 5 files.

Reproducibility: Do we have a high-confidence way to reproduce the issue? Yes. Current main and v2026.6.8 both compute `allowlistEnabled` from `hasGroups`, so explicit `groupPolicy: "open"` with a populated `groups` map is source-reproducible as blocking unlisted groups.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] A repair worker can align the remaining docs and remove the changelog edit, but maintainer acceptance of the access-boundary behavior remains before merge.

target.title: fix(channels): keep groupPolicy=open loose when groups dict has per-group overrides
target.author: voicewitness
